tweets.text:
A Forum Park Crips gang member has been sentenced to 29 years in prison for his role in a Houston, TX, sex trafficking operation after sexually abusing and exploiting numerous young girls.

He and three previously sentenced co-conspirators sexually exploited victims through force, threats, rape and coercion.

Damarquis McGee aka Lilblue will serve 15 years on supervised release after his incarceration and must register as a sex offender.

ICE HSI special agents investigated this case with local law enforcement and the Human Trafficking Rescue Alliance.

tweets.text:
An Illinois state official told others that Homeland Security warrants are "fake" during a virtual presentation.
 
That's a dangerous lie that puts people at risk.
 
Immigration warrants are lawful federal warrants executed under the authority of the United States government.
 
Telling people to hide from, evade or resist arrest by federal officers increases the risk of confrontation and is dangerous. 
 
No state government has the authority to obstruct federal law enforcement, and no person, regardless of their position, is immune from arrest or prosecution for violating federal law.

tweets.text:
ILLEGAL ALIEN CHARGED WITH RAPE WHILE TRAINING AS A CORRECTIONS OFFICER SET FREE BY PRISON

Ibrahim George Kallon, an illegal alien from Sierra Leone whose visitor visa expired in 2024, was arrested while training to be a Delaware County Prison corrections officer and charged by Glenolden Police for:

—Rape
—Involuntary deviate sexual intercourse
—Sexual assault
—Aggravated indecent assault
—False imprisonment
—Indecent assault

Delaware County Prison sent him back into the community despite an ICE immigration detainer, so ICE @EROPhiladelphia officers had to arrest him at-large Feb. 11.

If the county won’t protect its own residents, we’ll do it for them.

tweets.text:
Cassie Franklin, mayor of City of Everett, WA, escalates tension and directs city law enforcement to INTERVENE WITH ICE OPERATIONS AT THEIR OWN DISCRETION — putting everyone at greater risk. 

She also directs city workers to city workers to impede ICE operations and expose the location of ICE officers and agents. 

Working AGAINST ICE forces federal teams into the community searching for criminal illegal aliens released from local jails — INCREASING THE FEDERAL PRESENCE. 

Working with ICE reduces the federal presence.   

If Mayor Franklin wanted to protect the people she claims to serve, she’d empower the city police with an ICE 287g partnership — instead she serves criminal illegal aliens.

tweets.text:
AMERICAN HEROES.

Two off-duty ICE agents in Minnesota acted swiftly to save the life of a young boy who was drowning in a hotel pool.

Upon discovering the child unconscious, not breathing, and showing no signs of life, the agents immediately began administering CPR.

Paramedics arrived and the young boy eventually regained consciousness.

If our agents had not been there and taken action, this would have been a tragic outcome. Thanks to their training, these two agents were able to save a life.

tweets.text:
COLD CASE MURDERER DEPORTED

In 2009, Kemar Hamilton, a Jamaican criminal illegal alien, murdered a 58-year-old Jamaican immigrant father of seven in Bronx, NY — the victim had been shot outside his own home during a mugging.

Hamilton fled the scene.

While Hamilton hid from justice on New York streets, immigration officials were already processing his removal orders, and an immigration judge ordered him removed in 2009.

The case went cold until 2011, when Hamilton was arrested during a NYPD traffic stop for illegally carrying a loaded handgun. 

The following year, investigators determined that Hamilton was a DNA match for evidence collected at the murder scene.

His other convictions include:
— Aggravated assault
— Smuggling contraband into a prison
— Attempted assault
— Criminal weapons possession

A judge in New York sentenced Hamilton to over a decade in prison. 

ICE @EROBuffalo officers arrested him, Oct. 6, 2025, upon his release from the Wende Correctional Facility in Alden to prevent his release into the community. 

ICE @ERONewOrleans deported him last month.

tweets.text:
ICE HSI CASE SECURES 12-YEAR PRISON SENTENCE FOR CHILD SEX PREDATOR

Investigators found large amounts of candy and kids' clothes in Andrew DeJesus' luggage--and 600 files of child sexual abuse material on his phone--when he arrived at Boston's Logan Airport.

In August 2025, DeJesus, a U.S. citizen, was denied entry to the Dominican Republic because he's been a sex offender since 2010, when he was convicted in Massachusetts for:

—SEXUALLY ASSAULTING A CHILD UNDER 14
—POSESSING CHILD SEXUAL ABUSE MATERIAL
—CHILD SEXUAL EXPLOITATION

The 66-year-old pleaded guilty to one count of possessing child sexual abuse material, and a federal judge in Massachusetts sentenced him to 12 years in prison this month.

tweets.text:
TEXAS DRUG DEALER WHO SEX TRAFFICKED MISSING 15-YEAR-OLD GETS 50 YEARS AFTER ICE HSI DALLAS-LED PROBE

@HSIDallas agents with federal partners and @CityofArlington police arrested Jamal Howard after finding the girl he trafficked and evidence of narcotics distribution in his home. 

Howard's co-conspirator, Renaldo Rojas, received a 30-year sentence for giving the girl fentanyl, then giving her to Howard in exchange for more fentanyl.

Howard took the child, advertised her for sex, and trafficked her to several individuals while dealing drugs.
